GOOGLE_API_KEY.title: Google API key (reads)
GOOGLE_API_KEY.description: A Google API key with the Google Sheets API enabled. Used for the READ actions. Only works against sheets shared as "anyone with the link can view".

GOOGLE_ACCESS_TOKEN.title: OAuth access token (writes)
GOOGLE_ACCESS_TOKEN.description: Optional pre-obtained OAuth2 access token with the spreadsheets scope. Used for the WRITE actions. If set, the refresh-token fields are not needed.

GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID.title: OAuth client id (writes)
GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID.description: OAuth2 client id for the refresh-token flow (writes).

GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET.title: OAuth client secret (writes)
GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET.description: OAuth2 client secret for the refresh-token flow (writes).

GOOGLE_REFRESH_TOKEN.title: OAuth refresh token (writes)
GOOGLE_REFRESH_TOKEN.description: OAuth2 refresh token with the spreadsheets scope, for the refresh-token flow (writes).

actions.name: listTabs
actions.label: List Tabs
actions.description: List every tab (worksheet) in a Google Sheet, with each tab's allocated grid size. Use to discover tabs before reading one — the tab name is often itself a lookup key. Makes one API call.

spreadsheetId.title: Spreadsheet ID or URL
spreadsheetId.description: The Google Sheet's id, or a full sheet URL.

actions.name: describeSheet
actions.label: Describe Sheet
actions.description: Inspect one tab: its real used row/column count and its column headers (header names are trimmed). Detects the populated range, ignoring stray formatting that inflates the reported grid size. Makes one API call.

spreadsheetId.title: Spreadsheet ID or URL
spreadsheetId.description: The Google Sheet's id, or a full sheet URL.

headerRow.title: Header row (1-based)
headerRow.description: Which row holds the column headers. Defaults to 1.

actions.name: loadRows
actions.label: Load Rows
actions.description: Load one tab (or an explicit A1 range within it) as header-keyed row objects. Use for product feeds, eval data, and flow inputs. Supports paging with limit/offset. For several tabs at once use Load Tabs. Makes one API call.

spreadsheetId.title: Spreadsheet ID or URL
spreadsheetId.description: The Google Sheet's id, or a full sheet URL.

range.title: A1 range (optional)
range.description: A range within the tab, e.g. A1:D100. Omit to read the whole used range.

headerRow.title: Header row (1-based)
headerRow.description: Which row holds the column headers. Defaults to 1.

limit.title: Max rows
limit.description: Maximum data rows to return (after offset).

offset.title: Offset
offset.description: Number of leading data rows to skip. Defaults to 0.

actions.name: loadTabs
actions.label: Load Tabs
actions.description: Load several tabs in one batched call. With no tabs given it loads ALL tabs in the spreadsheet. Returns per-tab headers and rows. One batched read (plus one metadata call when loading all) — far cheaper than looping Load Rows.

spreadsheetId.title: Spreadsheet ID or URL
spreadsheetId.description: The Google Sheet's id, or a full sheet URL.

tabs.title: Tabs (optional)
tabs.description: Tab names to load. Omit or leave empty to load ALL tabs.

headerRow.title: Header row (1-based)
headerRow.description: Which row holds the column headers in each tab. Defaults to 1.

actions.name: getColumnValues
actions.label: Get Column Values
actions.description: Read the values down a single named column (matched by trimmed, case-insensitive header). The reference-data workhorse: allowed values for an attribute, a dictionary, a rules list. Optional distinct/dropEmpty. Makes one API call.

spreadsheetId.title: Spreadsheet ID or URL
spreadsheetId.description: The Google Sheet's id, or a full sheet URL.

column.title: Column header
column.description: The column to read, by header name.

headerRow.title: Header row (1-based)
headerRow.description: Which row holds the column headers. Defaults to 1.

distinct.title: Distinct only
distinct.description: Drop duplicate values. Defaults to false.

dropEmpty.title: Drop empty
dropEmpty.description: Drop blank cells. Defaults to true.

actions.name: lookupRows
actions.label: Lookup Rows
actions.description: Find rows where a column matches a value, optionally returning only selected columns. Powers key->value mapping lookups across a table. matchMode: eq (default), contains, or startsWith. Makes one API call.

spreadsheetId.title: Spreadsheet ID or URL
spreadsheetId.description: The Google Sheet's id, or a full sheet URL.

matchColumn.title: Match column
matchColumn.description: The column to match against, by header name.

matchValue.title: Match value
matchValue.description: The value to look for in matchColumn.

returnColumns.title: Return columns (optional)
returnColumns.description: Only return these columns. Omit to return whole rows.

headerRow.title: Header row (1-based)
headerRow.description: Which row holds the column headers. Defaults to 1.

actions.name: appendRows
actions.label: Append Rows (write)
actions.description: Append new rows to the bottom of a tab. The safe write action — it never overwrites existing data. Row objects are aligned to the tab's columns (provide columns to fix the order, or the header row is used). Defaults to RAW input so values are stored literally. Requires OAuth credentials.

spreadsheetId.title: Spreadsheet ID or URL
spreadsheetId.description: The Google Sheet's id, or a full sheet URL.

rows.title: Rows
rows.description: Row objects to append (keyed by column name).

columns.title: Columns (optional)
columns.description: Explicit column order. Omit to use the tab's header row.

valueMode.title: Value input mode
valueMode.description: raw (default, stored literally) or user (parsed like a person typed it).

actions.name: updateRange
actions.label: Update Range (write)
actions.description: Overwrite a specific A1 range in a tab. The deliberate write action — it replaces whatever is there (including formulas), so target a range you own. Provide either values (a 2D array) or rows + columns. Defaults to RAW input. Requires OAuth credentials.

spreadsheetId.title: Spreadsheet ID or URL
spreadsheetId.description: The Google Sheet's id, or a full sheet URL.

range.title: A1 range
range.description: The range within the tab to overwrite, e.g. A2:D10.

values.title: Values (2D array)
values.description: Rows of cell values. Use this OR rows+columns.

rows.title: Rows (objects)
rows.description: Row objects, turned into values using columns. Use this OR values.

columns.title: Columns
columns.description: Column order, required when writing rows.

valueMode.title: Value input mode
valueMode.description: raw (default, stored literally) or user (parsed like a person typed it).
